latin: Vir poculum in mensa ponens suspiravit: 'ex omnibus cauponibus in omnibus oppidis in toto orbe terrarum, illa in meam intravit.'

questions.prompt: What is the coincidence he laments?
questions.target: Of all the bars in the world, she walked into his
choices: Of all the bars in the world, she walked into his

translation: The man, setting his glass on the table, sighed: 'Of all the bars in all the towns in the whole world, she walked into mine.'
